welcome.content: 👋 Parents, please complete this questionnaire to provide a holistic overview of {student_name}, including their learning profile as well as their social, emotional, mental health, speech and language and sensory needs.

background_1.question: Why are you seeking an assessment for {student_name} at this time?

background_2.question: Which of the following areas are of concern for {student_name}? (Please select all that apply.)
background_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

background_3.question: Do you require this report for {student_name} for a specific purpose?
background_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

background_4.question: Which of the following best describes {student_name}'s current status?
background_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

background_5.question: Has any previous diagnosis been suggested for {student_name}?
background_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

family_1.question: Who does {student_name} typically live with during term time?
family_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

family_2.question: Is there any family history of Specific Learning Difficulties (SpLD), ADHD, ASD, anxiety or depression within {student_name}'s family?
family_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

family_3.question: Has {student_name} experienced any significant life events within the last 18 months?
family_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

family_4.question: Which languages are spoken in {student_name}'s home?
family_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

dev_milestones_1.question: As far as you are aware, did {student_name} achieve early developmental milestones (such as walking and talking) within the expected timeframe?
dev_milestones_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

dev_milestones_2.question: Did {student_name} have any hearing or vision concerns during childhood (for example, grommets or glasses)?
dev_milestones_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

dev_milestones_3.question: Which hand does {student_name} usually write with?
dev_milestones_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

dev_milestones_4.question: Was {student_name} ever assessed during childhood (for example, by an Educational Psychologist, Speech and Language Therapist, Occupational Therapist or paediatrician)?
dev_milestones_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

health_1.question: Is {student_name} currently taking any medication?
health_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

health_2.question: How would you describe the quality of {student_name}'s sleep?
health_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

health_3.question: Does {student_name} use any substances, such as alcohol or recreational drugs? (This is a sensitive question and is optional.)
health_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_1.question: How would you describe {student_name}'s GCSE results profile?
education_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_2.question: How would you describe {student_name}'s A-Level or equivalent results profile?
education_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_3.question: Has {student_name} ever held formal Access Arrangements at school, college or university?
education_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_4.question: Did {student_name} experience multiple changes of school?
education_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_5.question: If so, please describe the reasons for the move or moves.

education_6.question: Has {student_name} had any periods of absence from education, or any difficulties attending school or university?
education_6.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_7.question: If so, please provide further detail.

education_8.question: Were any concerns raised about {student_name} at school or university?
education_8.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_9.question: If so, please provide further detail.

education_10.question: What is {student_name}'s current university course and year of study (or the most recent, if they have graduated)?

education_11.question: How is {student_name} managing with independent living at university (for example, accommodation, cooking, laundry, social life and finances)?
education_11.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_12.question: To what extent can {student_name} sustain attention throughout a 50 to 60 minute lecture?
education_12.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_13.question: How does {student_name} manage the volume of university reading lists?
education_13.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_14.question: To what extent does {student_name} experience communication or participation difficulties during group work or seminars?
education_14.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_15.question: Has {student_name} considered taking a year out, changing course, or applying for mitigating circumstances?
education_15.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_16.question: Is {student_name} in paid employment alongside their studies?
education_16.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_17.question: Is {student_name} registered with the University Disability Service, and has a Study Needs Assessment been carried out?
education_17.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_18.question: Is {student_name} in receipt of the Disabled Students' Allowance (DSA)?
education_18.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_19.question: How are {student_name}'s university examinations currently sat or invigilated?
education_19.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_20.question: Is {student_name} currently in employment?
education_20.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_21.question: Which workplace tasks does {student_name} tend to find most challenging?
education_21.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_22.question: Is {student_name} aware of the Equality Act 2010 and their entitlement to reasonable adjustments?
education_22.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_23.question: Have any workplace adjustments been agreed for {student_name}?
education_23.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_24.question: Has {student_name} experienced workplace burnout, sickness absence, or performance reviews linked to their difficulties?
education_24.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_25.question: Has {student_name} applied to the Access to Work scheme?
education_25.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

attention_1.question: How would you describe {student_name}'s reading speed in comparison with their peers?
attention_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

attention_2.question: Does {student_name} typically need to re-read material before it is understood or retained?
attention_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

attention_3.question: Does {student_name} experience difficulties with spelling?
attention_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

attention_4.question: Does {student_name} tend to lose track of instructions, or forget where they had reached in a task?
attention_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

attention_5.question: Does {student_name} appear to work more slowly than their peers, even when they understand the material?
attention_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

attention_6.question: Does {student_name} experience attention difficulties, such as distractibility or appearing to lose focus?
attention_6.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

attention_7.question: Which of the following methods does {student_name} usually use to take notes?
attention_7.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

attention_8.question: Does {student_name} use any assistive technology?
attention_8.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

emotional_1.question: Has {student_name} accessed any mental health support, either currently or in the past?
emotional_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

emotional_2.question: Has {student_name} experienced signs of burnout, such as extended late-night working or sustained sleep deprivation?
emotional_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

emotional_3.question: Has {student_name} experienced social isolation since beginning higher education or employment?
emotional_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

emotional_4.question: Does {student_name} experience exam-related anxiety, such as racing thoughts, mental blanking or intrusive worries during examinations?
emotional_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

emotional_5.question: Are there any safeguarding concerns relating to {student_name}, such as self-harm or suicidal thoughts? (This is a sensitive question.)
emotional_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

independent_learning_1.question: How would you describe {student_name}'s independence with daily living tasks (for example, cooking, cleaning, laundry and food shopping)?
independent_learning_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

independent_learning_2.question: How does {student_name} manage financially (for example, budgeting, bills and banking)?
independent_learning_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

independent_learning_3.question: How does {student_name} manage personal administration (for example, emails, appointments and paperwork)?
independent_learning_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

independent_learning_4.question: Does {student_name} have a partner, spouse or housemate who supports them with their study or work?
independent_learning_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

independent_learning_5.question: Has {student_name} considered medication or therapy for attention or mood difficulties?
independent_learning_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

independent_learning_6.question: Does {student_name} use alcohol or recreational drugs? (This is a sensitive question and is optional.)
independent_learning_6.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

independent_learning_7.question: Has {student_name} experienced any difficulties learning to drive, or with their current driving?
independent_learning_7.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

independent_learning_8.question: How would you describe {student_name}'s exercise or physical activity routine?
independent_learning_8.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

strengths_1.question: What are {student_name}'s career goals, and in which direction do they hope to progress?

strengths_2.question: What are {student_name}'s strengths, as you see them?

strengths_3.question: Is there anything else you would like the assessor to know about {student_name}?

strengths_4.question: Is {student_name} currently studying for any qualifications outside their main course (for example, CPD or professional qualifications)?
strengths_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

strengths_5.question: Have any colleagues, lecturers or supervisors raised concerns about {student_name}'s work?
strengths_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

strengths_6.question: How are {student_name}'s studies funded, or how are they supported financially?
strengths_6.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

closing_message.content: Thank you for completing the questionnaire. Your responses have been recorded and will be reviewed by the educational psychology team.

complete.content: Thank you so much for completing this assessment!
